speaker: speaker1
text: What can I help you with ?

speaker: speaker2
text: How many hours behind the wheel do I need ?

speaker: speaker1
text: What do you need to take it for ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I'm trying to get my license .

speaker: speaker2
text: Can I do all six hours in one day ?

speaker: speaker1
text: You have to do it in three days .

speaker: speaker2
text: That's all I have to do ?
